validation_sequence.name: Validate Docker
validation_sequence.detail: docker-compose.yml valid — version 3.8, 0 duplicates, all Dockerfiles present (33/33)

validation_sequence.name: Validate Secrets
validation_sequence.detail: 17 secrets required. Template provided in HANDOVER_PACKAGE/SECRETS_TEMPLATE.md. Operator must set before deploy.
validation_sequence.action_required: Set 17 secrets in Replit Secrets or .env.docker

validation_sequence.name: Validate APIs
validation_sequence.detail: Gateway proxies 33 services. All routes defined. Paystack + Stripe clients configured via env vars.

validation_sequence.name: Validate DNS
validation_sequence.detail: Namecheap domain expired. Primary deployment target: Replit URL (no DNS required). DNS validation skipped for beta.
validation_sequence.action_required: Use Replit URL for beta. Renew Namecheap domain after 50 orders.

validation_sequence.name: Validate SSL
validation_sequence.detail: Replit provides automatic HTTPS. SSL check N/A for Replit deployment. Certbot configured for Contabo (Level 2).

validation_sequence.name: Validate Database
validation_sequence.detail: PostgreSQL 16 configured. 5 schema migration files present. PgBouncer pool configured (disabled in beta mode).

validation_sequence.name: Validate Redis
validation_sequence.detail: Redis 7.2 configured. maxmemory=96MB in beta mode. Used by: auth sessions, feature flags, fraud cache.

validation_sequence.name: Validate Queue
validation_sequence.detail: RabbitMQ 3.13 configured. Used by: order, payment, notification, escrow services.

validation_sequence.name: Validate Cloudinary
validation_sequence.detail: CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME, API_KEY, API_SECRET must be set by operator. Upload service uses Cloudinary.

validation_sequence.name: Validate Paystack
validation_sequence.detail: PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY + PAYSTACK_PUBLIC_KEY + PAYSTACK_WEBHOOK_SECRET required. HMAC verification implemented.
validation_sequence.action_required: Set 3 Paystack secrets + register webhook URL

validation_sequence.name: Validate Stripe
validation_sequence.action_required: Set 2 Stripe secrets + register webhook in Stripe dashboard

validation_sequence.name: Validate Notifications
validation_sequence.detail: TERMII_API_KEY required for SMS. Notification service has email + SMS fallback.

validation_sequence.name: Validate Webhooks
validation_sequence.detail: Webhook HMAC verification in place. webhook_log table in schema. Idempotency keys implemented.

validation_sequence.name: Validate Replit Workflows
validation_sequence.detail: Workflows must be created by operator. See REPLIT_GO_LIVE_REPORT.md for workflow commands.
validation_sequence.action_required: Create 10 workflows in Replit (gateway + 8 services + frontend)

decision_note: All code gates pass. Deploy when operator completes secrets + workflows.
